## [00:00 - 01:14]

Lead nurturing and follow-up have resulted in a 35% lift in lead generation. Salespeople, sales representatives meet quotas at higher rates and there's a shorter ramp up time for brand new salespeople. Now if your management team hadn't seen this particular segment, make sure you show it to them. When you nurture a lead correctly, understand this, there's a 35% lift in lead generation. Also the company is more likely to continue advertising when the sales department is following up leads. I mean why continue to generate leads that nobody's going to nurture? Sales rep meet quotas at higher rates internationally across the board and there's a shorter ramp up time for a brand new salesperson. Lead nurturing, follow-up, persistent, consistent, scheduled follow-up will lift your income, lift your sales, you're more likely to meet your quotas, there's a shorter ramp up time and I could be a brand new person coming to an organization with a bunch of senior salespeople that don't follow up and don't nurture leads and in no time I could be the top salesperson in that organization. Lead nurturing and follow-up are critical to your career.
